series_metadata.series_title: Above Ground Storage Tank Permit Application Files
series_metadata.series_description: File contains tank permit applications and may contain correspondence related thereto, site plans, correction letters and correction letter responses, and construction permit approval letters.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copies of approved applications in operating area until converted to machine readable format. Upon confirmation that machine readable format has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy paper copy of the approved applications. Retain invalidated permits, denied and abandoned application paper copies for one year after denial, invalidation, or abandonment, then destroy paper copies. ; Microform: Retain microfilm for four years after created, then destroy. ; Electronic: Maintain machine readable format for four years after converted to machine readable format, then delete., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
